title: Fix wire unpacked array to slice convert to wider unpacked array

features.name: unpacked array with single-element slice declaration
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array declared with a single-element slice range index (e.g., wire1[3:3]) as input

features.name: concatenation of multiple single-element slice unpacked arrays
features.description: Code should include a concatenation of two single-element slice unpacked arrays where each has a different slice index

features.name: assignment from unpacked array concatenation to wider unpacked array
features.description: Code should include an assignment where concatenated unpacked arrays (total 2 elements) are assigned to a wider unpacked array (also 2 elements)
features.snippet:
output wire y[1:0];
assign y = {wire1, wire2};
